message:
🌱 Add kubescape: Default upload of scan results should be opt-in mission (#777)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,81 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "kubescape-132-default-upload-of-scan-results-should-be-opt-in",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "kubescape: Default upload of scan results should be opt-in",
+    "description": "Default upload of scan results should be opt-in. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check Kubescape installation",
+        "description": "Verify your Kubescape installation:\n```bash\nkubescape version\n```\nInstall if needed: `curl -s https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kubescape/kubescape/master/install.sh | /bin/bash`. Kubescape can run as a CLI tool or be deployed in-cluster."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review kubescape configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant kubescape configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n kubescape -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubescape\nkubectl get configmap -n kubescape -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kubescape\n```\nI want to preface this issue as, I think `kubescape` is a pretty nice and nifty tool. It's especially useful for finding misconfigurations in k8s clusters, pods, containers, etc. But, I also want to say that `--results-locally` should not be opt-in."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Default upload of scan results should be opt-in",
+        "description": "Hi   and thank you for your feedback.\n\nAs i'm replying to you I'm working on fixing this issue, in the mean time you can follow the instructions provided [here](https://github.com/armosec/kubescape/issues/193#issuecomment-951343897)\n\nIf you do not have the framework cached, you can download the\n```yaml\n> kubescape scan framework nsa --exclude-namespaces kube-system,kube-public --use-from /tmp/nsa.json\n>\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kubescape -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubescape\nkubectl get events -n kubescape --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Default upload of scan results should be opt-in\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Hi   and thank you for your feedback.\n\nAs i'm replying to you I'm working on fixing this issue, in the mean time you can follow the instructions provided [here](https://github.com/armosec/kubescape/issues/193#issuecomment-951343897)\n\nIf you do not have the framework cached, you can download the [release](https://github.com/armosec/regolibrary/releases/tag/v1.0.79) running ->\n```\ncurl -L ",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "> kubescape scan framework nsa --exclude-namespaces kube-system,kube-public --use-from /tmp/nsa.json\n>",
+        "\u25b6 kubescape scan framework nsa --exclude-namespaces kube-system,kube-public\nerror: failed to download file, status code: 403 Forbidden\nARMO security scanner starting\n[progress] Downloading/Loading framework definitions\nkind: Framework, name: nsa, error: failed to download file, status code: 403 Forbidden",
+        "curl -L  https://github.com/armosec/regolibrary/releases/latest/download/nsa -o nsa.json"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "kubescape",
+      "incubating",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "kubescape"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Pod",
+      "Service"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "incubating",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/kubescape/kubescape/issues/132",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/kubescape/kubescape",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/kubescape/kubescape/pull/139"
+    },
+    "reactions": 4,
+    "comments": 15,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl",
+      "kubescape"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with kubescape installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-12T06:26:59.674Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
